title: Apex Fusion Block Producer Helm Values
description: Supernode-opinionated Apex Fusion block producer chart values. This schema is the public configuration interface for LLMs and MCP clients; pass values in this shape directly to Helm. Producer runtime material must be sourced from Vault.

nameOverride.description: Advanced, usually not modified. Overrides the Kubernetes app name used by the chart.

fullnameOverride.description: Advanced, usually not modified. Overrides the full Kubernetes resource name. Leave empty so the release name controls resource names.

displayName.description: Optional. Human-readable workload name shown by Supernode tooling. MCP normally sets this from releaseName.

image.description: Optional. Apex Fusion node container image settings.

resources.description: Optional. Kubernetes CPU and memory requests and limits for the private block producer container.

relayResources.description: Optional. Kubernetes CPU and memory requests and limits for managed relay containers.

persistence.description: Required. Persistent storage for the block producer chain database.

relayPersistence.description: Required. Persistent storage for each managed relay chain database.

node.description: Required. Apex Fusion block producer runtime settings. Set node.network and usually leave low-level ports unchanged.

network.description: Required. Apex Fusion network to join.

networkMagic.description: Advanced, usually not modified. Overrides derived testnet magic. vector-testnet derives 1 and prime-testnet derives 3311.

n2nPort.description: Advanced, usually not modified. Internal node-to-node port.

metricsPort.description: Advanced, usually not modified. Internal node metrics port.

socketPath.description: Advanced, usually not modified. Node socket path shared with the proxy sidecar.

blockProducer.description: Required. Private producer runtime settings. Only kes.skey, vrf.skey, and op.cert runtime material should be synced into this pod from Vault; keep cold keys and counters outside the cluster.

debug.description: Optional. Mount producer material and emit block-producer metrics env, but do not pass forging flags to the node.

poolId.description: Optional but recommended. Pool ID used by metrics for leader schedule calculations.

mountPath.description: Advanced, usually not modified. Mount path for producer runtime material.

kesKeyFile.description: Advanced, usually not modified. KES signing key filename in the Vault-synced Secret.

vrfKeyFile.description: Advanced, usually not modified. VRF signing key filename in the Vault-synced Secret.

operationalCertificateFile.description: Advanced, usually not modified. Operational certificate filename in the Vault-synced Secret.

relays.description: Required. Relay topology for the private block producer. relays.count creates managed relays inside this release. If relays.count=0, provide relays.trusted explicitly. MCP does not auto-resolve trusted relays; use workloads.list to inspect candidate apex-fusion-relay workloads.

count.description: Number of managed relays to create inside this release. Use 0 only when relays.trusted is provided.

trusted.description: Explicit trusted relay endpoints used when count=0.

useLedgerAfterSlot.description: Topology useLedgerAfterSlot value. Private producers typically use -1.

proxy.description: Advanced, usually not modified. Node-to-client TCP proxy settings. The proxy is always enabled and uses chart-owned nginx configuration.

nodeSelector.description: Advanced, usually not modified. Kubernetes nodeSelector for producer scheduling.

tolerations.description: Advanced, usually not modified. Kubernetes tolerations for producer scheduling.

affinity.description: Advanced, usually not modified. Kubernetes affinity rules for producer pod placement.

topologySpreadConstraints.description: Advanced, usually not modified. Kubernetes topology spread constraints.

service.description: Optional. Kubernetes Service settings for the private producer Service. Managed relays are always ClusterIP.

storageClass.description: Required. Kubernetes StorageClass used for the chain-data PVC.

existingClaim.description: Advanced, usually not modified. Existing PVC name for the producer. Managed relay persistence always creates PVCs.

path.description: Required. Runtime Vault path without kv/data prefix, for example runtime/apex-fusion/prime-mainnet-bp/block-producer.

ref.description: VaultAuth reference used by chart-managed VaultStaticSecret resources.
